page.title: File/Folder Name Translator
page.description: Select files or folders, generate a dry-run preview, then safely apply renames after confirmation.
page.loading_plan_desc: Restoring the preview, selected paths, and apply state from the plan you just created.
page.loaded_from_agent_desc: Viewing plan {{planId}} with {{count}} targets. This is still a dry run; no files have been modified.

path.dialog_title: Select files or folders whose names should be translated
path.drop_hint: Mixed selections are supported. Preview generation does not modify the filesystem.
path.empty: Selected paths will show type, child counts, and risk labels.

self.label: Selected name
self.hint: Translate only the selected file or folder itself

children.label: Direct children
children.hint: Translate only the first level inside folders

path_segments.label: Path segments
path_segments.hint: Requires explicit start and end levels later

options.max_depth_hint: Only used for recursive children. 20 is effectively unlimited.
options.skip_hidden_hint: Hidden paths such as .env and hidden folders are skipped by default
options.preserve_extension_hint: Only translate the file stem; keep extensions such as .srt or .mp4
options.preserve_tokens_hint: Try to keep tokens such as S01E02, 1080p, and release group tags

preview.title: Preview
preview.empty_desc: After selecting paths and generating a preview, you can review, edit, skip, and apply changes here.
preview.pagination_hint: {{count}} items per page to avoid rendering huge previews at once.

apply.title: Apply
apply.no_plan_hint: Every real rename writes a journal first. This flow never bypasses the dry-run preview.
apply.blocked_hint: Apply is enabled only when blocked is 0 and ready is greater than 0.
apply.confirm_hint: High-risk rules are checked before applying.

risk.title: Confirm high-risk rename
risk.journal_hint: A journal is written under app data and can help with best-effort rollback, but it is not a transaction guarantee.
risk.apply_hint: apply-rename-plan is called only after confirmation.

messages.select_paths_first: Select at least one file or folder first.
messages.preview_created: Preview generated. No files have been modified.
messages.plan_not_found: Rename plan {{planId}} was not found. It may have expired or been cleared; please generate a new preview.
messages.plan_loaded_from_agent: Loaded the rename preview from HomeAgent.
